# Tivozanib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tivozanib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tivozanib</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tivozanib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Fotivda is indicated for the first line treatment of adult patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC) and for adult patients who are VEGFR and mTOR pathway inhibitor-naïve following disease...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>endocervical carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>adenoid cystic carcinoma of the cervix uteri（99.8%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament serous adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>signet ring cell variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>cervical adenosquamous carcinoma, glassy cell variant（99.8%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>intestinal variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma, minimal deviation variant（99.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/tivozanib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
